original_image_tags: A yellowed index card, approximately 4x6 inches, held by clear tape to a larger, light-blue or gray backing sheet. The card contains a handwritten letter in blue ink. The backing sheet has punch holes at the top and archival stamps at the bottom.

elements.description: A single page containing a pasted handwritten note on an index card. The handwritten note contains legible text: 'To whom it may concern: I would like to know just how much truth is in Donald Keyhoe's book "The Flying Saucers Are Real" published this year by the Fawcett Publications, Inc. Keyhoe quotes a vast amount of information from the Air Force and the F.B.I. Sincerely yours, J. L. Adams ack 7-7-50 DDC'. There are multiple stamps, including a red 'RECORDED' stamp over the text, a faint purple date stamp 'JUL 5 1950', and handwritten numbers '62-83894-239' in red and 'JUL 18 1950' in purple at the bottom. A blue ink checkmark is present on the right.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements: a handwritten note on an index card, archival stamps, and handwritten numbers, with no contradictions on the specific content described.
